title: Decoding immunotherapy resistance in multiple myeloma: genetic insights and approaches to counter resistance.
snippet: Multiple myeloma (MM) is a hematologic malignancy characterized by clonal proliferation of plasma cells and presents major therapeutic challenges due to its intrinsic heterogeneity and frequent development of resistance to immunotherapy. Although recent advances in immunotherapeutic strategies, including immunomodulatory drugs (IMiDs), chimeric antigen rece...
